dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Woah, it's already second semester, time flies.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: So hot. Still hot in September. Lose weight, keke.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Hey, there's no breeze. Level three!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Level three!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Refreshing, keke. It's a mini fan, keke, keke. You jerks! This is humiliating!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: I wanna die! Hey! It's too cold! Stop!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Ugly face, haha.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Your mouth, it stinks. It's cold. Oh, are you cold?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Hey, you're making it cold! Stop the fan!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: The teacher is here!

dialogue.speaker: TEACHER
dialogue.line: Quiet! We have a new transfer student.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Transfer? Guy? A girl? At our school?

dialogue.speaker: TEACHER
dialogue.line: Come on in.

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL PARK
dialogue.line: I'm Daniel Park. Nice to meet you.

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL PARK
dialogue.line: Ugh, they are all staring at me. Don't make eye contact.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: He's f***ing gorgeous! Wow!

dialogue.speaker: TEACHER
dialogue.line: Take that empty seat.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: His appearance caused a stir in the class.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: 5'9ft? 6ft? Geez! He's so cool!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Great body.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The girls whose hearts raced and the girls to be cautious of him.

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL PARK
dialogue.line: And, it's the first day! Gotta start out right! I must get close with whoever's sitting next to me first. Last year was a nightmare.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Hey, talk to me and I'll kill you.

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL PARK
dialogue.line: Okay!

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL PARK
dialogue.line: Last year's memory. With a big smile! Hello!

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL PARK
dialogue.line: Is it a quirk of fate? It was Kim. Yeah, hi. The guy who beat me up! He's f***ing handsome.

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL PARK
dialogue.line: Things go wrong from day one!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: His side profile is hot too.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Model?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Lucky to see him.

dialogue.speaker: ZOE
dialogue.line: Daniel? Hi, I'm Zoe.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Zoe Park. I knew she would do that. As soon as she sees someone good-looking, she's on it again. Wow, she's hot!

dialogue.speaker: ZOE
dialogue.line: Hey, you've got something on your face!

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL PARK
dialogue.line: Klk? Where? Wait.

dialogue.speaker: ZOE
dialogue.line: That, b****. Handsome thing! Kekeke.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: That b****!!!

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL PARK
dialogue.line: Oh. It was the first time since I was born that a girl flirted with me.

dialogue.speaker: ZACK
dialogue.line: Hey, Zoe. Stop flirting and sit, it's annoying.

dialogue.speaker: ZOE
dialogue.line: Oh, Zack! Scary! What~?

dialogue.speaker: ZACK
dialogue.line: Stop doing that, b****!

dialogue.speaker: ZOE
dialogue.line: Jerk!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Nice! Zack!

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL PARK
dialogue.line: Huh?

dialogue.speaker: MIRAI
dialogue.line: I hate the transfer d***head!

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL PARK
dialogue.line: Something feels off.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: As a specialty high school, my new school focuses on Phys Ed Dept, Practical Music Dept, Architecture & Interior Design Dept, Baking Dept, Vocal & Dance Dept, Beauty Dept, Fashion & Clothing Design Dept. More practical training and work experience programs rather than going to college. Fashion Dept, Beauty Dept (hair dyeing permitted, 90% with altered uniforms), Practical Music Dept (each with an instrument). Neighboring school students (on the way to school). That kind of freedom was a nightmare for other school students. But the school was also known for having many K-pop artist trainees, models, and popular idols.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Lunch time! And today...

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Daniel, what kind of side dishes do you like?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Waaah! He's so freaking hot!

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL PARK
dialogue.line: I only have to get my own food and not serve others.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: There's a new star on the scene!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Floozies! Look away!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: And there's an anxious girl.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: They say... crazy... He's in the Fashion Dept. Transfer? Damn cool, handsome. He has a girlfriend?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Hey, newbie!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: We need to talk after lunch.

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL PARK
dialogue.line: Klk?!

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL PARK
dialogue.line: What's this? I know this situation! I got beat in a place like this all the time.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: So, your name's Daniel?

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL PARK
dialogue.line: Um. Scary! I spent all my money on this uniform.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Where are you from? You're freaking tall. Ah, sweet. You, keke, made trouble and that's why you're here, right? Look at your shoulders. You work out?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: You must be a ladykiller. Hook me up sometime, big guy.

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL PARK
dialogue.line: What should I do? If I say I can't smoke, they'll think I'm a wuss.

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL PARK
dialogue.line: Uh, I quit smoking.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Amazing! Wow!

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL PARK
dialogue.line: And I don't know any girls.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: This d***!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: He's pretty imposing! Then I'm out. This punk must be a fighter. Get out of here!

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL PARK
dialogue.line: I'm saved. It's just he got so nervous that his face froze.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: He's got some nerve! Humph! That prick definitely works out.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: After lunch.

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL PARK
dialogue.line: Keke. He's sleeping well. Time to fight off sleepiness! And he's even cute when he sleeps.

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL PARK
dialogue.line: I fell asleep too!

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL PARK
dialogue.line: Oh s***! I wake up in the other body when I fall asleep! I must have fallen asleep at school since that body couldn't sleep for long! Because I tossed and turned all night worrying about going to school with that body. I gotta get back to that body! I'm not sure if I can sleep when I've slept all day!

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL PARK
dialogue.line: In order to switch bodies, I have to sleep by my own efforts. I'm gonna wake him up and talk to him again.

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL PARK
dialogue.line: I'm screwed! I can't sleep! Oh come on! F*** f*** f*** f*** f***! Wake up!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: What? Are they fighting?

dialogue.speaker: DANIEL PARK
dialogue.line: Or someone has to force me to wake up.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Is the skank getting told off? Hilarious! Haha, embarrassing, keke.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Did he just swear at me? Did she wake me up?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: This is nuts!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Damn, damn.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Danny.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: And there's this hopeless girl.

summary: Daniel Park transfers to a new specialty high school, immediately attracting attention for his good looks, which leads to both admiration and bullying. He struggles with his dual-body secret, realizing he needs to sleep to switch back to his original body, but finds himself unable to sleep at school, leading to frustration.
